heading: Application of other laws
label: 1733 Application of other laws
text: The provisions of section 1430(a)(1) and 1430b of this title; the seventh paragraph of ; ; subsection (n) of section 77B of the Bankruptcy Act, as amended (); , continuing and extending the functions of the Reconstruction Finance Corporation; and all other provisions of law establishing rights under mortgages insured in accordance with the provisions of this chapter, shall be held to apply to such chapter, as amended.1section 24 of this titlesection 371 of this title49 Stat. 664section 606i of title 15See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was amended by , , , and, as so amended, the provisions formerly appearing in section 1430(a)(1) now appear in section 1430(a)(3)(A).Section 1430(a) of this titlePub. The Bankruptcy Act (, , as amended), which was classified generally to former Title 11, was repealed effective , by , §§ 401(a), 402(a), , , section 101 of which enacted Revised Title 11.
